query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.created_at,
  u.portal_status,
  acp.uniqueAgentId,
  acp.agentStatus,
  acp.id AS crm_profile_id
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND (acp.uniqueAgentId IS NULL OR acp.uniqueAgentId = '')
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
LIMIT 30;
